stemHtml: Among the masses calculated for mass and balance calculations is also the Regulated Landing Mass. Which of the following statements best describes the regulated Landing mass?

options.a: The Highest of the Performance Limited Landing Mass and the Maximum Structural Landing Mass.
options.b: The Lowest of the Performance Limited Landing Mass and the Maximum Structural Landing Mass.
options.c: The Performance Limited Landing mass MINUS the Trip Fuel.
options.d: Maximum Structural Landing Mass Minus the Trip Fuel.
